mainEntity.name: How many reviews needed for Phoenix firm AI visibility?
mainEntity.text: How many reviews needed for Phoenix firm AI visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: Minimum 50 Google reviews at 4.5+ stars, plus 20 Avvo. Patterns of 'responsive Phoenix attorney' strengthen signals.

suggestedAnswer.text: Phoenix AI tools weigh volume (50+), recency (70% last year), and keywords matching queries. Automate requests ethically. Below 30 reviews, near-zero citations. Agencies boost ethically for $1k/mo. Negative patterns tank trust—respond all.

name: Review Volume for Phoenix AI Success
description: Minimum 50 Google reviews at 4.5+ stars, plus 20 Avvo. Patterns of 'responsive Phoenix attorney' strengthen signals.
